name: Battlebond

draft.notes: ad card + basic land + rare + 3 uncommons + 10 commons. Foil (if present) appears between land and rare, displacing a common. Partner pairs always appear together: a rare/mythic partner pair fills both rare slots and drops an uncommon to 2; a foil partner adds a second foil and displaces a second common.

statedRates: Foil 1:67 cards. Chance of a rare/mythic partner pair ~1/10; uncommon partner pair ~29/139 (~1/5). Mythic rate probably 1/8 or 7/55.
sourceNotes: Two-player set with partner mechanic. Includes one variation of each basic land in packs. Printed in Japan, 112-card sheets, front-facing. 36 packs per box.
